text.title: CQRS Pattern Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing the methodology applied end-to-end, with a trace through the rules and the final spec artefact.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Order management bounded context: command handlers persist via the write model, projections consume domain events to populate three read models (orders-by-customer, daily-summary, search-index).

list.item: r1: command vs read DTOs separated.
